projectDescription: Lossless DFlash speculative decoding for Apple Silicon that generates 16 tokens per draft pass and achieves up to 4x inference speedup over baseline MLX.
keyFeatures: Block diffusion draft generates 16 tokens per pass — target verifies in one forward pass
Lossless output — every emitted token is verified against the target model before commit
Tape-replay rollback for GatedDeltaNet recurrent state without full snapshot overhead
JIT SDPA 2-pass custom Metal kernel for numerically aligned long-context verification
Auto draft resolution — no manual --draft flag required for supported models
OpenAI-compatible server with streaming SSE, tools, and reasoning support
Up to 4.13x speedup over baseline MLX on Apple M5 Max with 89% acceptance rate
publicApiSurface: dflash (CLI) — generate text with DFlash speculative decoding
dflash-serve (CLI) — OpenAI-compatible HTTP server using DFlash runtime
dflash-benchmark (CLI) — measure and compare baseline vs DFlash throughput
stream_dflash_generate() — streaming Python iterator for DFlash generation
generate_dflash_once() — single-shot DFlash generation returning summary dict
load_target_bundle() — load and configure target model with speculative hooks
RecurrentRollbackCache — cache for GatedDeltaNet layers with tape-replay rollback
make_target_cache() — build per-layer cache list for target model
resolve_optional_draft_ref() — auto-resolve draft model from registry
DRAFT_REGISTRY — mapping of base model names to HuggingFace draft model refs
